text.title: Backend Testing Across Languages Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for testing-backend-languages.

conclusion.verdict: RSpec + factory_bot + let/let! discipline; :integration tag for slow tier
MockitoExtension / DataJpaTest / WebMvcTest slices; SpringBootTest only with @Tag('integration')
xUnit + Moq + FluentAssertions; WebApplicationFactory only for HTTP integration
#[cfg(test)] mod tests {}; #[tokio::test] for async; integration tests under tests/

text.example: language=spring → MockitoExtension on OrderService unit tests; DataJpaTest on OrderRepository; WebMvcTest on OrderController. Rule: spring-slice-not-full-context.
